props.name: CoverSubtitle
props.text: Compile brand design into precise PowerPoint

props.name: MVBody1
props.text: Make every brand deck as sharp as the product it sells — from DESIGN.md to OfficeCLI tokens, recipes, and staging-safe apply.

props.name: MVBody2
props.text: Every team ships DESIGN.md-native slides with agent skill routing, without designers trapped in pixel push.
Mission is timeless; vision is dated and measurable.
Lead with the metric that decides the meeting.

props.name: OpenerBlurb
props.text: Brand systems live in DESIGN.md. Decks still ship as one-off slides.

props.name: BaBody1
props.text: Hand-built decks. Drifted brand. No gates. Agents invent layouts.

props.name: BaBody2
props.text: Compiled tokens. Recipe catalog. CJK-aware budgets. Gate 3 screenshots.
Call the single metric that proves the after state.
Prefer evidence over stereotypes in every quadrant.
One branch = one discussion thread; prune to ≤8.
Call the biggest emotion drop — that is the intervention.

props.name: OpenerBlurb
props.text: Two backends. One contract. Precision or draft — pick by need.

props.name: Pillar1
props.text:
Legacy

Shape-level batch. DESIGN.md geometry. scaffold --apply · restyle · master · Gate 3.

props.name: Pillar2
props.text:
Official

Agent-bridge JSON-RPC. office.render drafts. Version pin via doctor --install.

props.name: Pillar3
props.text:
Offline

Compose, a11y, refine, generate, animate OOXML — no binary required.
Pillars are non-negotiable investments, not initiatives.
Center is the organising idea; ring tiles are facets.
Legend carries the insight; the disc is orientation only.

props.name: Card3Body
props.text: Hex · puzzle · circle segments · risk heat · empathy
You cannot skip a stair — name the exit criteria per step.

props.name: CheckRow2
props.text: ✓  No silent truncation — shorten or split
Open items need an owner before the meeting ends.
Tie each metric to one owner and one review cadence.
Exactly one A per row; R does the work.
Name what breaks if any single piece is missing.

props.name: RiskItem13
props.text:
Font shrink to fit
Silent overwrite
Vendor template copy
Top-right cells need owners this week.
